title: Depositphotos API Vocabulary
description: Domain-specific terms and concepts used in the Depositphotos API

terms.definition: The developer API key issued upon registration with Depositphotos. Required for all API calls.
The name of the API method to invoke. All Depositphotos API calls use a single endpoint and specify the operation via this parameter.
Session token returned by login or loginEnterprise. Valid for three hours. Required for user-authenticated operations.
An authenticated API session established by calling login or loginEnterprise. Sessions expire after three hours.
API access tier for members who search the Depositphotos catalog and earn referral revenue when users purchase via Depositphotos.
API access tier that allows selling Depositphotos files directly on third-party websites at custom pricing.
API access tier for corporate clients requiring full licensing workflows, invoice management, license transfer, and AI image generation.
API bundle combining graphic design editor (VistaCreate), the 331M+ stock library, and generative AI tools for embedding creative capabilities.
A named collection of media items curated by a user, similar to a folder or board. Can be public or private.
The legal right to use a purchased media item according to specific terms. Depositphotos offers standard and extended licenses.
A unique identifier for a specific license transaction, used for redownloading, transferring, or auditing usage.
The category of a stock asset: image (photograph), vector (illustration), or video (footage).
Enterprise payment model where credits are purchased in advance and deducted per download.
Enterprise payment model where usage is tracked monthly and invoiced at the end of the billing period.
A free high-resolution test download available to Enterprise API clients for evaluation purposes.
The Depositphotos AI image generation service that creates stock-ready images from text prompts.
A child account under a Reseller API account, representing an end customer with their own balance and download history.
Maximum number of search results to return in a single request. Maximum value is 200.
Zero-based offset for paginating through search results.
A set of 30 popular search queries with relative popularity ratings on a 1-10 scale.
A group of related stock images shot together by the same photographer in the same context.
A billing document generated from licensing transactions for Enterprise postpaid clients.
Depositphotos product bundle including AI Image Generator, AI Assistant, and graphic design editor for generative creative workflows.
A time-limited URL returned by getMedia or reDownload that allows downloading the licensed high-resolution file.
The resolution/size option for a media purchase (e.g., s, m, l, xl, xxl, xxxl, el, vect).
The license type to apply when purchasing a media item (standard or extended).
